chunks.text: Sayeef Salahuddin receives James C. McGroddy Prize for New Materials. Sayeef Salahuddin, the TSMC Distinguished Professor of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences, was awarded the 2026 James C. McGroddy Prize for New Materials “for the discovery of ferroelectricity in ultra thin hafnium based oxides and their implementation in microelectronic devices.”
chunks.question: What award did Sayeef Salahuddin receive and for what discovery?
chunks.answer: James C. McGroddy Prize for ferroelectricity discovery.

chunks.text: Dawn Song selected as an AI2050 Senior Fellow by Schmidt Sciences. Professor Dawn Song was selected as a 2025 AI2050 Senior Fellow by Schmidt Sciences. The fellowship honors researchers advancing responsible innovation and the development of AI that benefits humanity. This year’s cohort includes 28 researchers from eight countries who will receive more than…
chunks.question: What fellowship did Dawn Song receive and what does it honor?
chunks.answer: AI2050 Senior Fellowship for responsible AI innovation.

chunks.text: Emma Pierson named Zhang Family Endowed Professor. Emma Pierson, who joined EECS earlier this year, was named the department’s Zhang Family Endowed Professor. Hao Zhang, M.A. ’05, Ph.D ’07, contributed $1 million to establish the endowment and support junior faculty working on artificial intelligence. Pierson’s research has many…
chunks.question: What professorship was Emma Pierson named and who funded it?
chunks.answer: Zhang Family Endowed Professor funded by Hao Zhang.

chunks.text: U.S. News ranks Berkeley’s undergrad engineering program No. 3 in the nation. UC Berkeley Engineering holds onto the No. 3 spot in U.S. News and World Report’s annual rankings of undergraduate engineering programs. U.S. News includes rankings for both computer engineering and computer science. Both are housed in the Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences, which is shared with the College of…
chunks.question: What ranking did UC Berkeley's undergraduate engineering program receive?
chunks.answer: Ranked No. 3 nationally by U.S. News.

chunks.text: Five students honored as Siebel Scholars. Five UC Berkeley students were honored as Siebel Scholars Foundation’s class of 2026. The graduate students — all from computer science — join more than 1,900 distinguished honorees advancing research in the fields of bioengineering, computer science, energy science and business.
chunks.question: How many UC Berkeley students were honored as Siebel Scholars?

chunks.text: Stuart Russell named to TIME100 AI 2025. EECS Professor Stuart Russell has been named to TIME100 AI 2025 list. A globally recognized leader in artificial intelligence, Russell is celebrated for his groundbreaking research and his role as a prominent voice in the field of AI safety.
chunks.question: What list was Stuart Russell named to and for what field?
chunks.answer: TIME100 AI 2025 list for AI safety leadership.

chunks.text: Serina Chang wins ACM KDD Dissertation Award. CS Assistant Professor Serina Chang, who joined UC Berkeley EECS in July, has been honored with the ACM Special Interest Group on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (SIGKDD) Dissertation Award for her thesis, “Computational Methods for Human Networks and High-Stakes Decisions.” Chang’s work sits at the intersection of AI…
chunks.question: What award did Serina Chang win and for what thesis?
chunks.answer: ACM KDD Dissertation Award for human networks thesis.

chunks.text: Qinghua Ding wins IEEE Jack Keil Wolf ISIT Student Paper Award. EECS Ph.D. student Qinghua Ding has been awarded the 2025 Jack Keil Wolf ISIT Student Paper Award at the IEEE International Symposium on Information Theory (ISIT). This prestigious award recognizes outstanding student-authored papers presented at ISIT, one of the premier conferences in information theory. Ding was selected for the paper,…
chunks.question: What award did Qinghua Ding win and at which conference?
chunks.answer: IEEE Jack Keil Wolf ISIT Student Paper Award.

chunks.text: Four EECS Faculty win inaugural Google ML and Systems Junior Faculty Awards. EECS Assistant Professors Natacha Crooks, Sagar Karandikar, Amy Pavel, and Rishabh Iyer have been selected to receive inaugural Google ML and Systems Junior Faculty Awards. This prestigious award recognizes early-career faculty whose research is advancing the frontiers of machine learning and systems. Each award includes $100,000 in unrestricted research funding.
chunks.question: How many EECS faculty won Google ML and Systems Junior Faculty Awards?
chunks.answer: Four assistant professors received the award.

chunks.text: Alvin Cheung receives ACSIC Rock Star Award. CS Professor Alvin Cheung has been awarded the Rock Star Award for Mid-Career Investigators by the Association of Chinese Scholars in Computing (ACSIC). This prestigious award recognizes individuals who have made outstanding contributions to computing within 12 years of completing their most recent computing-related degree. The ACSIC Rock Star Award…
chunks.question: What award did Alvin Cheung receive and from which organization?
chunks.answer: ACSIC Rock Star Award for mid-career investigators.
